---
title: "getting-started-with-censoredCI"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{getting-started-with-censoredCI}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(censoredCI)
```
